name: Divide Ensemble
explanation: A divide-down string + organ machine in the Roland RS-09 / Logan String Melody lineage. Distinct from lush Solina/Crumar string ensembles: it blends a Strings voice (sawtooth) and an Organ voice (divide-down square) per key, with slow attack/release and a wide three-voice ensemble chorus. Fully polyphonic (12 voices). Controls: Strings, Organ, Attack, Release, Ensemble and Level.
